notes: All 22 April 24 Playwright specs pass. Adds a canonical winning-line replay fixture (scripts/replay-2026-04-24-undermined-clear.json) and a spec that drives the fixture end-to-end through applyAction, asserting challengeCleared + scenarioPhase==='endless' and gardenHP>0. This is concrete runtime evidence that the Undermined board is clearable under scripted Loamspike pressure (the scenario scripts 5 Loamspikes across waves 2–4, and the clear resolves every one), which converts the validator's 'unwinnable under current search' finding into a validator-beam-search limitation to retune. It is NOT an A/B load-bearing test: it does not prove that Loamspike is the difference between clear and no-clear vs. a stripped roster, so the AC-9 two-run beam-search fixture (run with Loamspike stripped, confirm trivially clearable) is still a next-day validator enhancement.
